The '''impostor [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]]''' was a double arranged by the [[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] to sleep in his assigned room during the negotiations with [[Five World Prime Minister]] [[Aidel Saxan]] of the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. In the subsequent assassination [[Attack on Toryaz Station|attempt]] arranged by [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]], both he and Saxan were killed. The idea for a double had been presented to Pellaeon by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]], who had thought of it with the help of [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]].
